nasb.text: Your wealth and your treasures I will give for booty without cost, Even for all your sins And within all your borders.

esv.text: “Your wealth and your treasures I will give as spoil, without price, for all your sins, throughout all your territory.

cnv.text: 因你在四境之內所犯的一切罪， 我必把你的財產和寶物， 白白給敵人作掠物。

ccb.text: 因为你们境内罪恶泛滥，我要使敌人任意抢掠你们的财宝，
